name_en: Large Size with Lock, 22cm, Black. OHANEL 🍠🍠🍠 26CJennie Celebrity Style 🌟🌟🌟. A bit of fashion is just right. This new model is totally vantage since! It should be the Jennie outfit from the Paris Fashion Week. This small flap shoulder bag has a bit of vintage charm. It is a favorite! Flap shoulder bag 🆕 bursting with charm, super beautiful [ ][ ]! Limited design, playing with classics in a new way. Wear it and instantly become the focus of the crowd 🤩🤩. A must-have for fashionistas! Vintage style combined with the durability and easy care of cowhide. Small and exquisite, various shapes at will, great for styling! Dimensions: 15x22x7cm
